entries.title: OpenAI gives UK banks access to cybersecurity model
entries.summary: OpenAI has offered the UK's biggest banks access to its new cybersecurity AI model. The decision contrasts with the approach taken by rival Anthropic, which continues to keep its Mythos model out of the hands of non-US lenders.

entries.title: NY Fed Finds Remote Work, Not AI, Killed Entry-Level Jobs
entries.summary: Artificial intelligence may not be the cause of the sharp rise in youth unemployment, according to a Federal Reserve of New York blog post. Instead, remote work accounts for 64% of the increase, New York Fed research economist Natalia Emanuel, University of Virginia assistant professor Emma Harrington and Harvard University professor Amanda Pallais wrote […] The post NY Fed Finds Remote Work

entries.title: Saris Raises $28 Million to Bring Agentic AI to Banking
entries.summary: Saris has raised $28.8 million for its agentic workflow platform for financial institutions. The company’s Series A funding round, announced Monday (June 1), will be used to scale the Saris platform to more banks and credit unions, strengthen integrations with partners like Fiserv, Encompass and MeridianLink, and expand the team that trains and deploys […] The post Saris Raises $28 Million t

entries.title: Walmart Curbs Employee AI Use as Demand Spikes
entries.summary: Walmart has reportedly limited employees’ artificial intelligence usage amid rising demand. That’s according to a report Monday (June 1) by Bloomberg News, which calls the move an example of how companies are rethinking the way they use AI. Sources familiar with the matter told Bloomberg that Walmart has begun offering a set number of […] The post Walmart Curbs Employee AI Use as Demand Spik

entries.title: BBVA creates shared infrastructure for AI agent developmentt
entries.summary: The AI Transformation area, which sits at the top level of the organization and will be led by Antonio Bravo combines the current Data area with critical technological capabilities to industrialize the creation, deployment and management of artificial intelligence (AI) agents across the organization.

entries.title: Gradient Labs raises fresh funds to build specialist AI agents for finance
entries.summary: Gradient Labs, the startup founded by Monzo alumni to create AI agents for the financial services industry, has doubled its Series A round with $13 million in fresh funding.

entries.title: Apple Set to Accelerate Wallet War With Automated Bill Splitting
entries.summary: An upcoming iPhone feature will enable users to split bills by photographing a receipt, assigning items to different people, and then generating payments requests, Bloomberg reported Monday (June 1), citing unnamed sources. entries.title: What Transformation Programmes and Football Teams Have in Common
entries.summary: While in Copenhagen for the Temenos Community Forum, Will Moroney, Chief Revenue Officer, Temenos joined the FinextraTV studio to talk about the latest updates within core modernisation. entries.title: BIS reports back on open finance Project Aperta
entries.summary: Project Aperta, led by the Bank for International Settlements (BIS), has been designing, developing and testing a prototype for cross-border open finance interconnectivity via application programming interfaces (APIs) – a "network of networks" that connects existing domestic networks through a neutral interoperability layer.

entries.title: PayPal CEO leans on AI chief
entries.summary: The company’s new CEO, Enrique Lores, is counting on a newly appointed executive to lead a cost-cutting campaign using artificial intelligence.

entries.title: Finastra helps lenders turn more applications into loans with new analytics tool
entries.summary: Finastra today announced the launch of Data Insights 2.0, a powerful analytics solution designed to help mortgage lenders convert more applications into funded loans by turning complex data into decision-ready insights.

entries.title: OpenPayd to Go Public via $276M SPAC Deal, Targets Nasdaq Listing
entries.summary: OpenPayd and Titan Acquisition Corp have entered into a definitive business combination agreement, the companies said today (Monday). Under the deal, OpenPayd is expected to become a publicly listed company on Nasdaq and will trade under the ticker “OP” following completion. OpenPayd provides embedded finance infrastructure spanning FX, domestic and cross-border payments, open banking, and stablec

entries.title: eToro Stock Hits Seven-Month High as Rally Catches Up to Goldman's Target
entries.summary: eToro (NASDAQ: ETOR ) shares closed at their highest level in seven months on Friday, extending a recovery that has lifted the retail brokerage about 70% from the record lows it touched in February.
